codeSystems.name: BloodInStool
codeSystems.title: Blood in Stool
codeSystems.description: This value set includes concepts for the presence of blood in stool. Includes concepts for signs of blood in stool, including melena and hematoschezia. Excludes concepts for Blood in stool due to inflammatory bowel disease, hematoma, or neonatal/perinatal.

codeSystems.name: ColonoscopyProcedure
codeSystems.title: Colonoscopy Procedure
codeSystems.description: Concepts for a colonoscopy procedure intended for routine screening purposes or follow-up after an abnormal stool test.

codeSystems.name: CRCHereditarySyndrome
codeSystems.title: Hereditary Syndrome Associated with Colorectal Cancer
codeSystems.description: Includes concepts for hereditary syndromes associated with colorectal cancer

codeSystems.name: CrohnsDisease
codeSystems.title: Crohn's Disease
codeSystems.description: Concepts identifying conditions indicative of Crohn's Disease

codeSystems.name: FamilyHistoryCRC
codeSystems.title: Family History of colorectal cancer
codeSystems.description: Concepts for family history of colorectal cancer.

codeSystems.name: FamilyHistoryPolyps
codeSystems.title: Family History of Potentially Precancerous Polyps
codeSystems.description: Concepts for family history of polyps of colon.

codeSystems.name: FecalImmunochemicalTest
codeSystems.title: Fecal immunochemical test (FIT)
codeSystems.description: Concepts for a fecal immunochemical test.

codeSystems.name: GuaicFecalOccultBloodTest
codeSystems.title: Guaiac fecal occult blood test (gFOBT)
codeSystems.description: Concepts for a fecal immunochemical test.

codeSystems.name: HistoryCRC
codeSystems.title: History of Colorectal Cancer
codeSystems.description: Concepts for colorectal cancer with specific context of past history.

codeSystems.name: NonBleedingColorectalSignsSymptoms
codeSystems.title: Non Bleeding Colorectal Cancer Signs and Symptoms
codeSystems.description: Concepts for non-bleeding signs and symptoms often associated with colorectal cancer. Includes diarrhea, constipation, tenesmus, abdominal pain or cramping, fatigue or weakness, unintended or unexplained weight loss, change in bowel habits or stool shape.

codeSystems.name: PlanDefinitionActionCodes
codeSystems.title: Plan Definition Action Codes
codeSystems.description: This value set includes action codes for Plan Definitions within this implementation guide.

codeSystems.name: PlanDefinitionActionReasonCodes
codeSystems.title: Plan Definition Action Reason Codes
codeSystems.description: This value set includes action reason codes for Plan Definitions within this implementation guide.

codeSystems.name: PotentiallyPrecancerousPolypFindings
codeSystems.title: Potentially Precancerous Polyp Findings
codeSystems.description: Concepts for potentially precancerous polyp findings.

codeSystems.name: PotentiallyPrecancerousPolypsCondition
codeSystems.title: Potentially Precancerous Polyp Conditions
codeSystems.description: Concepts for potentially precancerous polyps disorders or conditions.

codeSystems.name: StoolDNAFecalImmunochemicalTest
codeSystems.title: Stool DNA FIT Test
codeSystems.description: Concepts for a stool DNA-FIT test.

codeSystems.name: UlcerativeColitis
codeSystems.title: Ulcerative Colitis
codeSystems.description: Concepts identifying conditions indicative of ulcerative colitis.
